query: DELETE FROM page_link_cache WHERE source_page_id = ?1 AND target_page_id IN (SELECT value FROM json_each(?2)) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM block_links bl JOIN blocks sb ON sb.id = bl.source_id WHERE COALESCE(sb.parent_id, sb.id) = ?1 AND sb.deleted_at IS NULL AND bl.target_id = page_link_cache.target_page_id )
